invariant: get_daily_readiness renders a typical day with one current meeting and one claim-backed focus item.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = get_daily_readiness returns the single meeting and claim-backed focus item with likely_current provenance.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds one synthetic meeting, one linked account, and one fresh current-state claim.
fixture_design_notes.external_replay: Pins the calendar event source_asof used by the focus item.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: Daily readiness contains exactly one meeting and one focus item.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: The focus item is field-attributed to the calendar-backed claim.
